title: Proclamation No. 1 of 1994: Summoning of Parliament

sections.heading: Full text
sections.text:
Supplemeoc to the Republic of Zambia Goyeraroenc 5
Gazc1cc 44wJ <be 12th /aouaO', 1994
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
STATUTORY INSTRUMENT No. 3 OF 1994
The Constitution of Zambia
Proclamation No. 1 of 1994
Summoning of Parliament
WHEREAS it is provided by Article 88 (1) of Lhe Constitution that
each session of Parliament shall be held at such place within
Zambia, and shall commence at such time as the President may
appoint:
AND WHEREAS it is expedient that Parliament should be
summoned:
Now THEREFORE, under and by virtue of the powers in me vested,
I, FREDERICK JACOB Trrus CrnLUOA, President of the Republic of
Zambia, do hereby proclaim and make known that the Thi rd Session
of the Seventh Parliament shall resume in Lusaka at 1000 hours on
the 21st day of January, 1994.
G1vEN under my hand and the Public Seal of the Republic at
Lusaka this 11th day of January. 1994.
8
FREDERICK J. T. CIIILUDA,
[NAS.7/48] President
Copies of this StaJutory lnstrwnenl can be obtained from the Go11ernmeru Prinler,
P.O. Box 30/3 6, /01()() Lusa/ca. Price K25.00 each.
